text: Jonathan Rinderknecht: Judge declares mistrial in arson trial of Palisades Fire suspect - ABC7 Los Angeles
fullText: A mistrial was declared in the arson case against Jonathan Rinderknecht, the man accused of setting what eventually became the Palisades Fire.

text: ‘Supergirl’ Lifts Off With $7.8M in Box Office Previews - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: Milly Alcock stars as the titular DC superhero in the Warner Bros. film from Craig Gillespie.

text: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama - The Verge
fullText: Less than 24 hours after news broke that the Trump administration requested that OpenAI stagger the release of GPT-5.6, OpenAI released the new model suite.

text: Trump threatens 100% tariff on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies' - CNBC
fullText: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," President Donald Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.

text: Millie Bobby Brown, David Harbour To Star In 'Spy In the Blood' Series - Deadline
fullText: Netflix has given a straight-to-series order to 'A Spy in the Blood' series with 'Stranger Things' alums Millie Bobby Brown and David Harbour to star

text: Small aircraft crashes into Beijing’s tallest building, eyewitnesses say - NBC News
fullText: An aircraft about the size of a car crashed into Beijing’s tallest building on Friday, two bystanders told Reuters, as police closed off roads around the skyscraper.

text: The Best Prime Day Smartphone Deals From Samsung, Google, and Motorola Are Ending Soon - PCMag
fullText: Need a new Pixel, Galaxy, or Razr? Hurry and grab your next flagship, foldable, or flip phone for a fraction of the price while these Prime Day smartphone deals last!

text: Trump says Iran violated ceasefire agreement by striking cargo ship, drone attacks - CNBC
fullText: The International Maritime Organization earlier paused efforts to evacuate ships and seafarers stranded in the Strait of Hormuz after a cargo vessel was struck.

text: Palestinians grieve for a father-to-be shot by Israeli troops the day his son was born - NPR
fullText: Nayef Samaro, 25, was killed in an Israeli military raid on Nablus, in the occupied West Bank, as he prepared to meet his wife at the hospital for the birth of their first child.

text: Judge for Charlie Kirk shooting case holds prosecutor in contempt, keeps death penalty on the table - CNN
fullText: A Utah judge in the case against the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk ruled Friday to hold a prosecutor in civil contempt for violating a pretrial publicity order but opted to leave the death penalty in place as a possible outcome in his murder trial.

text: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified information - NBC News
fullText: Former national security adviser John Bolton pleaded guilty in federal court Friday to mishandling classified information related to his work during the first Trump administration

text: Ukraine unleashes one of its heaviest drone bombardments, as Russia strikes Ukraine - NPR
fullText: Ukraine launched a major nighttime attack on a dozen Russian regions, Russian-held Crimea and the surrounding seas, and Russia attacked various regions of Ukraine, as their war grinds on.

text: Apple’s Touch MacBook to Use M5 Pro and Max Chips, With M7 Models to Follow - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Apple Inc.’s first-ever touch-screen laptop will rely on the company’s current high-end M5 chips, rather than next-generation silicon, though the company is working on a follow-up model with future M7 processors.

text: 'The Bear' season 5 ending explained: What happens to Carmy and the restaurant? - Entertainment Weekly
fullText: Goodbye, chef. This is how the fifth and final season of 'The Bear' ends — and what it means for Carmy, the restaurant, and more.

text: OpenAI IPO Fears Hit Oracle and Other Stocks Exposed to the ChatGPT Maker - Barron's
fullText: Oracle, CoreWeave, and other tech stocks drop after a report says the ChatGPT developer could delay its initial public offering until 2027.

text: World Cup projected round of 32 matchups, live bracket for knockout stage - USA Today
fullText: The 2026 World Cup round of 32 bracket is nearly complete with teams punching their tickets to the knockout round.

text: Mets fire manager Carlos Mendoza after 34-47 start - ESPN
fullText: The New York Mets fired manager Carlos Mendoza on Friday with the club toiling through a historically poor start.

text: NASA Rover Finds "Complex Organic Matter" on Mars - Futurism
fullText: Scientists confirmed that Perseverance had discovered a rock that contained "complex organic matter," the building blocks of life.

text: The strawberry moon will soon rise. When to look up. - The Washington Post
fullText: Be prepared Monday night, when the first full moon of summer will rise at 8:53 p.m. local time in Washington, 8:24 p.m. in Miami, 8:49 p.m. in Chicago and 8:26 p.m. in Los Angeles.
